company.name: AutoStream
company.description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform that provides automated video editing tools for content creators. It uses AI to streamline video production, add captions, enhance resolution, and automate repetitive editing tasks.

plans.name: Pro Plan
plans.best_for: Professional YouTubers, Instagram creators, and agencies

policies.details: No refunds are provided after 7 days from the date of purchase. Refund requests within the first 7 days will be honored in full.
24/7 live support is available exclusively on the Pro plan. Basic plan users receive email support with a 24-hour response time.
You may cancel your subscription at any time. Your access continues until the end of the current billing period.
A 7-day free trial is available for the Pro plan. No credit card required to start.
Custom enterprise pricing is available for teams of 5 or more. Contact sales@autostream.io for a tailored quote.

faqs.question: What platforms does AutoStream support?
faqs.answer: AutoStream supports exporting to YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, Twitter/X, and LinkedIn. Direct publishing integrations are available on the Pro plan.

faqs.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Upgrades take effect immediately; downgrades apply at the start of the next billing cycle.

faqs.question: Does AutoStream support team collaboration?
faqs.answer: Basic collaboration is available on Pro. For full team workspaces, contact us for an enterprise plan.

faqs.question: What video formats are supported?
faqs.answer: AutoStream supports MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV, and WebM as input formats. Output is delivered in MP4 with H.264 or H.265 encoding.
